title: T-056 — quality.haccp.* / quality.ccp.* / quality.complaint.* / quality.allergen_gate.* outbox events + permissions consolidation
prompt:
# T-056 — 09-e outbox events + permissions consolidation

PRD: §12.1 inbound/outbound consumers, §13.3 audit log completeness, §7.1 09-e epics

## Goal
Declare typed event contracts for HACCP/CCP/complaint/incident/allergen-gate outbox channels and consolidate the 09-e permission enum surface in packages/rbac.

## Implementation contract
1. packages/events/src/quality/haccp.ts: QualityHaccpPlanActivatedEvent, QualityCcpReadingRecordedEvent, QualityCcpDeviationCreatedEvent (severity, ccp_id, monitoring_record_id).
2. packages/events/src/quality/complaint.ts: QualityComplaintCreatedEvent, QualityComplaintEscalatedEvent, QualityComplaintResolvedEvent.
3. packages/events/src/quality/incident.ts: QualityIncidentCreatedEvent, QualityIncidentCorrectiveActionAddedEvent (overdue:bool), QualityIncidentVerifiedEvent.
4. packages/events/src/quality/allergenGate.ts: QualityAllergenGateApprovedEvent, QualityAllergenGateRejectedEvent, QualityAllergenGateOverrideApprovedEvent.
5. All events: required {tenant_id (org_id), occurred_at, actor_user_id, idempotency_key, payload type-specific}. Zod runtime validators.
6. packages/rbac/src/permissions.enum.ts consolidation: quality.haccp.{create,activate,read}; quality.ccp.{create,monitor,read}; quality.complaint.{create,read,escalate,resolve,export}; quality.incident.{create,read,add_corrective_action,verify,escalate}; quality.allergen_gate.{sign_second,reject,override,read}.
7. Idempotency-key conventions documented per channel: e.g. quality.ccp.deviation_created uses ccp_id+monitoring_record_id+'deviation_created'.

## Files
- packages/events/src/quality/haccp.ts [create]
- packages/events/src/quality/complaint.ts [create]
- packages/events/src/quality/incident.ts [create]
- packages/events/src/quality/allergenGate.ts [create]
- packages/events/src/index.ts [modify]
- packages/events/__tests__/quality-09e-events.test.ts [create]
- packages/rbac/src/permissions.enum.ts [modify]
- packages/rbac/__tests__/quality-09e-permissions.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the events package built, when imported, then 12 quality.{haccp,ccp,complaint,incident,allergen_gate}.* event types are exported each with required {tenant_id, occurred_at, actor_user_id, idempotency_key} and a Zod runtime validator
2. Given packages/rbac, when loaded, then 18 quality.{haccp,ccp,complaint,incident,allergen_gate}.* permissions are present in the enum (3+3+5+5+4-1 read-collapse = at least 18 strings; assert by canonical list)
3. Given a replayed QualityCcpDeviationCreatedEvent with identical idempotency_key, when the consumer side processes it, then the deduplication test stub shows it is suppressed (no duplicate downstream side-effect)
4. Given an event payload missing tenant_id, when the Zod validator runs, then it rejects with 'tenant_id required' error (validators are exhaustive)

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: packages/events/__tests__/quality-09e-events.test.ts + packages/rbac/__tests__/quality-09e-permissions.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs before code
- Run 'pnpm --filter events build && pnpm --filter events test && pnpm --filter rbac test'

## Risk red lines
- Do not invent event names — use canonical 12 listed above (cross-module event contract pin per audit A §1)
- All events must carry tenant_id (org_id) for downstream RLS resolution (Wave0)
- Idempotency keys per channel must be deterministic from payload fields, not random UUIDs
- Permissions canonical list lives in packages/rbac/src/permissions.enum.ts only (audit B §3 red-line)

pipeline_inputs.description: Typed event contracts for 09-e HACCP/CCP/complaint/incident/allergen-gate outbox channels + permissions enum consolidation + idempotency-key conventions.
pipeline_inputs.details: 4 new packages/events/src/quality/*.ts files exporting 12 typed events (haccp:3 + complaint:3 + incident:3 + allergen_gate:3) plus Zod validators. Each event required {tenant_id, occurred_at, actor_user_id, idempotency_key, payload}. Idempotency-key conventions per channel are deterministic from payload fields. packages/rbac/src/permissions.enum.ts gains 18+ quality.{haccp,ccp,complaint,incident,allergen_gate}.* permissions. Consumer-side dedup test stubs verify replayed events with identical idempotency_key are suppressed.
out_of_scope: Do not implement consumer-side worker logic (Foundation outbox worker scope)
Do not modify NCR event package (T-040 already owns quality.ncr.*)
Do not register cron/scheduler for retry (Foundation FT-040)
acceptance_criteria: Given the events package built, when imported, then 12 quality.{haccp,ccp,complaint,incident,allergen_gate}.* event types are exported with required {tenant_id, occurred_at, actor_user_id, idempotency_key} fields and Zod validators
Given packages/rbac loaded, when permissions enum is read, then at least 18 quality.{haccp,ccp,complaint,incident,allergen_gate}.* permission strings are present
Given a replayed QualityCcpDeviationCreatedEvent with identical idempotency_key, when consumed by the dedup stub, then the second event is suppressed
Given an event payload missing tenant_id, when its Zod validator runs, then it rejects with 'tenant_id required'
test_strategy: RED: quality-09e-events.test.ts + quality-09e-permissions.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs before code
Run 'pnpm --filter events build && pnpm --filter events test && pnpm --filter rbac test'
risk_red_lines: Use the 12 canonical event names (audit A §1 cross-module event contract pin)
All events carry tenant_id for downstream RLS (Wave0)
Idempotency keys deterministic from payload fields
Permissions canonical list lives in packages/rbac enum only (audit B §3)
